data.name: Tyrant Quest - Gold Edition 🔞
data.detailed_description:
Storyline:

Tyrant Quest is an erotic, dark fantasy visual novel about a Dark Lord who seeks revenge after being sealed away for a hundred years. But an important artifact was stolen from him, and without it, he is too weak to defeat his enemies. And so he sets out with his last loyal subject, the succubus Lili, seeking a way to regain his power.

Along the way, he will find new servants and meet new enemies. Among them, maybe he will encounter a mistress worthy of ruling by his side, and maybe he will build a harem fitting the Dark Lord. But whatever he does, he will have his revenge--or he will die trying!

Content:

Play an eroge with a long and intense storyline, with 15+ hours of gameplay featuring deeply developed characters.

Several romances are available, each with several intimate scenes to get your heart racing.

Every decision counts: would you be kind and good or harsh and cold with your companions?

A total of 7 different endings, including the possibility of establishing a harem.

Over 58 erotic scenes in CG for your viewing pleasure.

Sophisticated sound effects and original music to enhance the immersion.

Main Characters:

Lili is a succubus once bound to the Dark Lord’s former partner. After reviving him to fulfill her mistress’s last wish, she chooses to stay by his side. Though her motives begin as duty, she finds herself drawn to his ambition, and possibly something more.

Seren is the last descendant of the Dark Lord’s former lover. A gifted witch driven by revenge, she joins his cause to serve her own goals. As their paths intertwine, she begins to question whether her connection to the past is coincidence or something deeper she must confront.

Elanor is the princess of the elf kingdom, and after being taken to the Dark Lord’s domain, she finds herself in unfamiliar territory alongside her loyal bodyguard, Rin. Though gentle and idealistic, Elanor begins to question what she knows as she spends time with her former enemy. As new perspectives challenge her beliefs, she must decide whether to stay true to her upbringing or follow her evolving feelings in an unexpected direction.

Rin is a skilled swordswoman from a distant land and the devoted protector of Princess Elanor. Fiercely independent and unwavering in her duty, Rin is determined to resist the influence of the Dark Lord. Yet beneath her strong exterior lies a quiet longing, and if faced with the chance to pursue the one she secretly desires, she may find herself torn between loyalty and love.

Ancalia is a powerful dragon sealed into human form by Camellia, the high priestess who once subdued the Dark Lord. Though not interested in mortal conflicts, she is tied to Camellia’s cause by ancient vows. But her opinions shift as she observes the Dark Lord’s actions, and whether as enemy or ally, her decision will be her own.

Camellia is the heir to the priestess who once sealed the Dark Lord away one hundred years ago. Now she watches his return with growing interest, determined to shape his fate. Whether through persuasion or confrontation, she intends to test his strength and his resolve.

data.short_description: Tyrant Quest is an erotic, dark fantasy visual novel about a Dark Lord who seeks revenge after being sealed away for a hundred years. And so he sets out with his last loyal subject, the succubus Lili, seeking a way to regain his power!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 32 bits
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4200
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-920
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
